purpose: Initial S0FS POSIX/FUSE known-failure and classification file for issue 611.

disallowed_uses: treat unsupported features as passing behavior

baseline.failure: Filebench aborted with its own buffer-overflow detection

s0fs.failure: Same Filebench buffer-overflow failure as the overlay baseline

harness_limitations.notes: The runner can build and install Filebench from source, but this remote runtime failure is not S0FS evidence until Filebench itself has a passing overlay baseline.
